mapper.select: SELECT A.PROP_CD , A.PROP_NM , C.CAT_NM , B.COM_NM AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_YN , A.BADGE_TYPE , A.VIEW_CNT , A.SELL_PRICE , A.DEPOSIT , A.MONTHLY_RENT , DATE_FORMAT(A.CRE_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS CRE_DTM FROM TB_PROPERTY A LEFT JOIN TB_COM B ON B.GRP_CD = 'DEAL_TYPE' AND B.COM_CD = A.DEAL_TYPE AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TB_PROP_CATEGORY C ON C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.CRE_DTM DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT A.PROP_CD , A.PROP_NM , C.CAT_NM , A.VIEW_CNT , A.SELL_YN FROM TB_PROPERTY A LEFT JOIN TB_PROP_CATEGORY C ON C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.SELL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.RGT_USR_NM , A.RGT_PHONE , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BBS_PST R WHERE R.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND R.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND R.PST_LVL > 0 AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS REPLY_YN FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REPLY_YN ASC, A.IDX DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT B.JOB_CD , B.JOB_NM , B.USE_YN , B.LAST_EXEC_RSLT , DATE_FORMAT(B.LAST_EXEC_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS LAST_EXEC_DTM , (SELECT H.TGT_CNT FROM TB_BAT_HIST H WHERE H.JOB_CD = B.JOB_CD ORDER BY H.EXEC_START_DTM DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS LAST_TGT_CNT , (SELECT H.PROC_CNT FROM TB_BAT_HIST H WHERE H.JOB_CD = B.JOB_CD ORDER BY H.EXEC_START_DTM DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS LAST_PROC_CNT FROM TB_BAT B WHERE B.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY B.CRE_DTM
